# VisiCardly

> VisiCardly is an all-in-one platform for creating digital business cards, link-in-bio pages, digital menus, and team business card portals — sharable via a single custom link or QR code.

## Core Features

- Digital business cards with contact details, social links, and QR codes
- Link-in-bio pages with multiple customizable blocks (links, video, audio, text, images)
- Digital menu builder for restaurants and product catalogs
- Team accounts with company templates, branches, and branded business cards
- QR code generator with premium templates and custom URL support
- Multi-page profiles with drag-and-drop reordering
- Built-in analytics (page views, link clicks, engagement)
- Templates and full visual customization
- API access and white-label options on paid plans

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://visicardly.com/): Product overview and features
- [Restaurant Landing](https://visicardly.com/restaurant): Digital menu solution for restaurants
- [Pricing](https://visicardly.com/pricing): Plans, features, and billing options
- [Documentation](https://visicardly.com/docs): Full user guide for every feature
- [About](https://visicardly.com/about): Company information
- [Contact](https://visicardly.com/contact): Reach the team
- [Support](https://visicardly.com/support): Help center and FAQ
- [FAQ Data](https://visicardly.com/faq.json): Machine-readable FAQ
